exclude.chromedriver: version tracks Chrome browser releases, upgrade when CI Chrome version changes

exclude.core-js: minor bump, batch with next dependency update PR
exclude.eslint-plugin-chai-friendly: minor bump, batch with next dependency update PR
exclude.moment-timezone: minor bump, batch with next dependency update PR
exclude.snyk: minor bump, batch with next dependency update PR
